prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 7981 名→8737 名→14357 名→12731 名→13271 名。2021 至 2023 年位次大幅后移（从约 8000 名跌至约 14000 名），2024 年小幅回升至约 12731 名，2025 年再次后移至约 13271 名。近 3 年整体在 12700–14400 区间波动，2025 年基准约 13271 名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年连续 5 年均为 12 人，2026 年增至 13 人，扩招约 8.3%。扩招通常使最低录取位次数字增大（竞争相对缓和），但扩招幅度较小，影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 65 名，近年排名在 59–72 名之间波动，属于中上游 211，工科实力突出；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及一名拟录取研究生因发表不当言论被取消资格的事件，对学校形象有一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第 57 位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评 A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评 A-。其中软件工程、电子科学与技术（实验班）对应学科评估 A-，与招生专业中的电子科学与技术（实验班）、物联网工程等高度关联，对相关专业报考有正向吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类（对应电子科学与技术实验班、物联网工程）为高热推荐，计算机类持续高热；会计学为推荐；土木工程（茅以升班）所属土木建筑类为分化观望；英语所属外语类为一般观望。辽宁省 2026 年高考总报名约 20 万人，物理类考生估算约 14.3 万人，与 2025 年约 14.3 万人基本持平，竞争烈度未明显变化；省控线近年稳定在 360–368 分之间，波动较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 13271 名、2026 年小幅扩招（12→13 人）、物理类考生总数基本持平、声誉偏负面但抖音关注度尚可等因素：扩招使位次略有后移（数字增大），但考生规模未扩大、热门专业（电子、物联网）热度高形成一定支撑，位次后移幅度有限。预测 2026 年物理类最低录取位次约 14000 名，区间 13500–14500 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子科学与技术（实验班）
- 物联网工程（色盲限报）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新能源科学与工程（新能源和环科双学士学位）（色盲、色弱限报）
- 会计学（第一年在通州校区，第二年迁回校本部）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 英语（限招英语考生，第一年在通州校区，第二年迁回校本部）
- 土木工程（茅以升班）（色盲限报）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 13500–14500 名内，建议以二档专业（新能源科学与工程、会计学）为主攻方向，一档专业（电子科学与技术实验班、物联网工程）作为冲刺，三档专业（英语、土木工程茅以升班）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如 13500 名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7981, 8737, 14357, 12731, and 13271 respectively. Rankings dropped significantly from 2021 to 2023 (from about 8000 to about 14000), slightly recovered to about 12731 in 2024, and then dropped again to about 13271 in 2025. In the past 3 years, rankings fluctuated within the range of 12700–14400, with a baseline of about 13271 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province remained at 12 students for 5 consecutive years from 2021 to 2025, and increased to 13 students in 2026, an expansion of about 8.3%. Expansion usually increases the minimum admission ranking number (relatively less competition), but the expansion is small and has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is about 65th, fluctuating between 59th and 72nd in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with strong engineering capabilities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a prospective graduate student was disqualified for making inappropriate remarks, which has a certain negative impact on the university's image. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms and moderate attention. No obvious record of admission gaps was found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A, and Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-. Among them, Software Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology (Experimental Class) correspond to the A- discipline evaluation, which is highly related to the Electronic Science and Technology (Experimental Class) and Internet of Things Engineering majors in the enrollment, providing positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication categories (corresponding to Electronic Science and Technology Experimental Class, Internet of Things Engineering) are highly recommended, Computer category remains highly popular; Accounting is recommended; Civil Engineering (Mao Yisheng Class) belongs to the Civil Engineering and Architecture category, which is in a wait-and-see state; English belongs to the Foreign Language category, which is generally in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the total number of Liaoning Province college entrance examination registrants is about 200,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 143,000, basically the same as about 143,000 in 2025, with no significant change in competition intensity. The provincial control line has been stable between 360–368 points in recent years, with small fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13271, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (12 to 13 students), the basically unchanged total number of Physics Category candidates, the slightly negative reputation but moderate Douyin attention, etc.: the expansion causes the ranking to shift slightly backward (number increases), but the candidate scale has not expanded, and the high popularity of hot majors (electronics, IoT) provides some support, limiting the extent of the ranking shift. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 14000, with a range of 13500–14500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Internet of Things Engineering (Color blindness restricted).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- New Energy Science and Engineering (Dual Bachelor's Degree in New Energy and Environmental Science) (Color blindness and color weakness restricted)
- Accounting (First year at Tongzhou Campus, second year moves back to main campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Only English-speaking candidates, first year at Tongzhou Campus, second year moves back to main campus)
- Civil Engineering (Mao Yisheng Class) (Color blindness restricted).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13500–14500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (New Energy Science and Engineering, Accounting) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electronic Science and Technology Experimental Class, Internet of Things Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (English, Civil Engineering Mao Yisheng Class) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13500), you can focus on sprinting for the top-tier engineering majors in Tier 1.
